Plaintiff Patrick Gabirelli'S Continued Motion For Evidentiary And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling WAS adopted AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's motion to for evidentiary and monetary sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. The motion for evidentiary sanctions is denied. The motion for monetary sanctions is granted in the amount of $2,515. The sanctions shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Hold Deposition Of Rani Jarkas In Abeyance And Motion To Continue Sanctions Hearing Scheduled For Aug-29-08;
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Mark P. Meuser, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Global Crown Capital, LLC
John A. McGuinn, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Patrick J. Gabrielli

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Global Crown Capital, LLC's Motion For Protective Order To Hold Deposition Of Rani Jarkas In Abeyance And Motion To Continue Sanctions Hearing are denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Deponent Rani Jarkas' Attendance At Deposition Or, In The Alternative, Precluding Rani Jarkas From Providing Any Testimony In This Matter And Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Patrick Gabrielli's motion to compel attendance at deposition.
The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. The motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. The deposition of Rani Jarkas shall be completed by August 22, 2008. The motion for evidentiary and monetary sanctions is continued to August 29, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
